title: 5 Skills to Stay Employable in the AI Era ft. Ansh Mehra
description:
👉India’s first ‘learn by doing’ experience for growing your wealth. Imagine being able to build your own personal finance plan while attending a class, live. Apply to this upcoming FREE class this week here on Zerodha Varsity: https://openinapp.link/tsje3

👉By Think School: https://thethinkschool.com/

👉VIDEO INTRODUCTION:
AI is no longer just about tools. It is about agents that can think, act, and execute faster than entire teams.
In this episode,  Ansh Mehra (Founder, Cutting edge school) one of India’s earliest AI educators, breaks down how AI Agents are changing the way businesses operate, decisions are made, and careers are built.

This conversation goes beyond the hype and focuses on the real shift from using tools to building intelligent workflows. From the SHAPE framework to real business use cases, Ansh explains why most people are using AI the wrong way and how the smartest builders are gaining an unfair advantage.

You will learn why writing SOPs matters more than prompts, why distribution and trust are the biggest moats today, and how companies using AI agents are moving faster while others are falling behind.
If you are a founder, operator, or someone trying to stay relevant in the AI era, this episode will change how you think about work, skills, and business.

Watch the episode now.
